title: Verdant Tides
description: This Resource Pack Turns Netherite Armor, Totem, etc. into a Sea-Green color
body:
## 💧 Sea-Green Netherite – A Fresh New Look for Your Gear 💧

Tired of the same old dark Netherite? This resource pack gives your Netherite armor, tools, weapons, and even the Totem of Undying a sleek sea-green makeover! Whether you're battling mobs or just flexing your gear, you'll look cool doing it—literally.

This pack is perfect for players who want a clean, refreshing aesthetic without going too far from the vanilla feel. It keeps the original shapes and details intact, just swaps out the color for something a little more vibrant and ocean-inspired.

## ✨ Features:

  Sea-green recolor of all Netherite armor & tools

  Recolored Totem of Undying to match the theme

  Great for fantasy, aquatic, or just chill survival builds

No OptiFine or mods needed—just load and play!

🎨 Created with love for those who want their Netherite to stand out in a cool, subtle way.
